mlb.headline: Cubs acquiring LHP David Peterson from Mets, sources say
mlb.summary: The Chicago Cubs are acquiring left-hander David Peterson from the New York Mets, sources told ESPN's Jeff Passan.

mlb.headline: Cubs' Swanson on tear vs. Mets: 11 RBI in DH, 15 for series
mlb.summary: Dansby Swanson had 11 RBI in the Cubs' doubleheader sweep of the Mets, breaking the franchise record of 10 set by Hall of Famer Ron Santo on July 6, 1970.

mlb.headline: Athletics vs. San Francisco Giants: Game Highlights
mlb.summary: Athletics vs. San Francisco Giants: Game Highlights

mlb.headline: Devers, Bericoto homer in ninth inning, Giants rally past A's 2-1
mlb.summary: — Rafael Devers hit a tying home run leading off the ninth and Victor Bericoto connected one out with a drive over the center-field fence, sending the San Francisco Giants to a 2-1 victory against the Athletics on Wednesday night.

mlb.headline: France homers, Sears wins season debut as Padres beat Braves 5-2 for 3-game sweep
mlb.summary: — Ty France homered and JP Sears won his season debut for the San Diego Padres, who beat the NL East-leading Atlanta Braves 5-2 on Wednesday night for a three-game sweep.

mlb.headline: Atlanta Braves vs. San Diego Padres: Game Highlights
mlb.summary: Atlanta Braves vs. San Diego Padres: Game Highlights

nhl.headline: Byram: Ready for opportunity as Blackhawks' No. 1 defenseman
nhl.summary: Bowen Byram is stepping in as the Blackhawks' No. 1 defenseman after he was acquired in a trade with the Sabres on Tuesday night.

nhl.headline: How to watch 2026 NHL draft on ESPN
nhl.summary: It's time for the 2026 NHL draft! Here's how to catch the action on ESPN.

nhl.headline: 2026 NHL draft: Buzz on prospects, trades, free agency
nhl.summary: The first round is Friday. Our reporters pass along the latest intel they're hearing from around the league.

nhl.headline: NHL trade grades: Report cards for biggest deals of 2026 offseason
nhl.summary: The summer trade season is officially on fire! Find grades for each GM involved in all the big swaps here.

nhl.headline: Capitals sign forward Alex Tuch to extension after Sabres trade
nhl.summary: The Capitals completed a sign-and-trade for Alex Tuch from the Sabres on Wednesday. Tuch signed an eight-year extension with the Capitals averaging $10.5 million a year, and the Sabres got a third-round draft pick in 2026 and forward David Kampf.

nhl.headline: Sabres GM says he expects to lose Alex Tuch to free agency
nhl.summary: Sabres GM Jarmo Kekalainen said Wednesday that with little progress in talks to re-sign Alex Tuch, he is expecting to lose the veteran forward to free agency.

nba.headline: Duke's Isaiah Evans among those to land on Night 2 of NBA draft
nba.summary: Isaiah Evans, who had a seat in the green room through Tuesday's first round of the NBA draft, highlighted the well-known names taken in Wednesday night's second round.

nba.headline: Sources: Hornets seriously engaged in LaMelo Ball trade talks
nba.summary: The Hornets are seriously engaged in trade talks with multiple teams aggressively pursuing star point guard LaMelo Ball, sources said.

nba.headline: Shams: Hornets 'seriously engaged' with interested suitors over LaMelo Ball
nba.summary: Shams: Hornets 'seriously engaged' with interested suitors over LaMelo Ball

nba.headline: 2026 NBA buzz: Latest news, injuries, league intel, updates
nba.summary: We're tracking the latest news, rumors and buzz across the NBA, including what we're hearing ahead of free agency.

nba.headline: AJ Dybansta, Cameron Boozer top 2026 NBA draft superlatives
nba.summary: AJ Dybansta's unique jersey situation leads the nonstatistical and personality-based superlatives from the 2026 NBA draft.

nba.headline: NBA trade tracker: Updates for every deal of the 2026 offseason
nba.summary: We have the updates, including players and draft picks, for every NBA trade made this summer.

wnba.headline: Williams scores 23 points to help the Valkyries beat the Dream 77-66
wnba.summary: — Gabby Williams scored 23 points on 9-of-16 shooting, Kayla Thornton hit five 3-pointers and finished with 17 points, and the Golden State Valkyries beat Atlanta 77-66 on Wednesday night to snap the Dream's four-game win streak.

wnba.headline: 'Absolutely unacceptable!' Stephanie White livid over lack of protection for Caitlin Clark
wnba.summary: 'Absolutely unacceptable!' Stephanie White livid over lack of protection for Caitlin Clark

wnba.headline: Skylar Diggins scores 15 points to lead Sky over Fire 101-78
wnba.summary: — Skylar Diggins had 15 points to lead seven Chicago players scoring in double figures and the Sky beat the Portland Fire 101-78 on Wednesday night to snap a six-game losing streak.

wnba.headline: Kahleah Copper scores 28, Mercury beat Fever 111-109 as Clark leaves due to back injury
wnba.summary: — Kahleah Copper made 15 of 16 from the free-throw line and finished with 28 points, and the Phoenix Mercury beat Indiana 111-109 on Wednesday night after Fever star

wnba.headline: Chicago Sky vs. Fire - Game Highlights
